LanguageData.VQE_Dronetech.label: dronetech
LanguageData.VQE_Dronetech.description: Unlocks the ability to construct specialized work drones and the necessary infrastructure to keep them operational.

VQE_Dronetech.generalRules.rulesStrings.li: subject_story->pioneered the first fully synchronized drones
subject_story->transformed scattered machines into a unified automated grid
subject_story->saw beyond isolated units to the elegance of coordinated autonomy
subject_gerund->orchestrating fleets into seamless operational harmony
